events.name: cave_discovery
events.description: Lava tube entrance found — potential expansion space.

events.name: epidemic
events.description: Unknown pathogen spreads through the water system.

events.name: dust_storm
events.description: A massive dust storm engulfs the colony for weeks.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

meta_awareness.insight: Rust Vega asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'
Storm Mar asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'
Storm Sto-III whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'

**Ember Sto** (earth/sentinel) — Year 95

The earth in me stirs with possibility.


*— Ember Sto, sentinel*

**Storm Mar** (air/artisan) — Year 95

Another year. We are still here.


*— Storm Mar, artisan*

The air in me stirs with possibility.
